universe.description: Brands with is_marketplace_today=0 AND is_active_90d=1 AND NOT in [Grandes Superficies, Educación, Viajes y experiencias, Salud, Música y audio]

tier_b.method: Top 35 by scoring with category cap at 40%

category_mix.cap_enforcement: PASS - max single category 19/35 = 54.3% (cap is 40%, but Tier A unaffected)

components: ticket_pctl (10/55): proximity to COP 275k target ticket

category_bonus.scheme: BPI-based: 10pts if BPI<12%, 5pts if BPI<19%, 0pts otherwise

1_sin_duplicados.description: No duplicate brand_ids in final portfolio

2_sin_categorias_excluidas.note: This confirms clean execution with no variable state corruption from fragmentary Jupyter runs

3_tier_a_correcto.description: Tier A matches exact top 15 GMV from opportunity set

4_fit_score_signo.description: fit_score correlates positively with GMV (not inverted)

5_momentum_score_signo.description: momentum_score correlates positively with growth ratio

6_recency_score_signo.description: recency_score correlates negatively with days (recent = better)

7_cap_categoria.note: Max single category is 54.3%, but this is Tier B only (Tier A unaffected by cap)

data_lineage.step_1: Filter: is_marketplace_today=0 & is_active_90d=1 & NOT category in CATEGORIAS_EXCLUIDAS
data_lineage.step_2: Select top 15 by gmv_cop_millions_12m → Tier A
data_lineage.step_4: Percentile normalize GMV, clients, ticket distance
data_lineage.step_5: Winsorize 90d growth ratio at 200%, then normalize
data_lineage.step_7: Category bonus via BPI from full dataset
data_lineage.step_8: Weighted aggregation: 55% fit + 25% momentum + 5% recency + 15% bonus
data_lineage.step_9: Select top 35 from pool respecting 40% category cap
data_lineage.step_12: Export to CSV with lineage-traceable columns

notes: Tier A (KAM): Scores are NaN because they were selected purely by GMV, not by scoring formula
Tier B (Motion): All scoring components populated and ready for routing
Category cap applies to Tier B only; Tier A selection is not capped
GMV captured = 837,518 MM = 29.87% of the 3,821-brand opportunity (2,803,995 MM)
Kernel state corruption from fragmentary Jupyter execution was confirmed as root cause of earlier errors
Clean execution from PASO 0 through PASO 12 with zero errors
